name: SBI Cashback Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹2,00,000 or more in the previous year

welcomeBenefits.condition: On card activation and first transaction

additionalBenefits: No reward point tracking or redemption hassle
Works on all online merchants without category restrictions
pros: Flat 5% cashback on all online spends is among the best in the segment
Cashback is auto-credited — no manual redemption needed
Reasonable annual fee with achievable waiver threshold of ₹2 lakh
4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year
Welcome voucher partially offsets first-year fee
cons: Online cashback capped at ₹5,000 per month
3.5% foreign currency markup is on the higher side
idealFor: Heavy online shoppers who prefer straightforward cashback over reward points
Users who want a simple, no-hassle cashback card without category tracking
Those looking for a mid-range card with strong online rewards

faqs.question: Is the 5% cashback applicable on all online transactions?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 5% cashback applies on all online spends including e-commerce, bill payments, and subscription services. However, wallet loading, rent payments, and EMI transactions are excluded.

faqs.question: How is the cashback credited?
faqs.answer: Cashback is automatically credited to your card statement. There is no need to manually redeem points or vouchers.

faqs.question: What is the maximum cashback I can earn per month?
faqs.answer: The 5% online cashback is capped at ₹5,000 per month, which means you can earn maximum cashback on online spends up to ₹1,00,000 per month. The 1% offline cashback has no specified cap.

faqs.question: How can I get the annual fee waived?
faqs.answer: The annual fee of ₹999 is waived if your total spends in the previous year exceed ₹2,00,000.
